subject: [PATCH v4 01/21] mm/swap: decouple swap cache from physical swap infrastructure

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the introduction of a single global lock, suggesting it may lead to performance issues. Asked for more information on how this will be addressed in future versions.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series decouples the swap cache from physical swap infrastructure, preparing for virtualization of swap space. It removes swap cache related helpers and introduces a single global lock to synchronize swap cache accesses temporarily.
